'''鈭歞-sh-j''' ('''dashaja''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cutesify|cutesify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-sh-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cutesify|cutesify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-sh-j
|-
! Lemma
| dashaja
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dashajithi|dashajithi]] || [[word:dashajiji|dashajiji]] || [[word:dashajishi|dashajishi]] || [[word:dashaji|dashaji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dashajuthuth|dashajuthuth]] || [[word:dashajujuj|dashajujuj]] || [[word:dashajushush|dashajushush]] || [[word:dashaj|dashaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dashajuthu|dashajuthu]] || [[word:dashajuju|dashajuju]] || [[word:dashajushu|dashajushu]] || [[word:dashaju|dashaju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dashajufuth|dashajufuth]] || [[word:dashajufuj|dashajufuj]] || [[word:dashajufush|dashajufush]] || [[word:dashajuf|dashajuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dashajethe|dashajethe]] || [[word:dashajeje|dashajeje]] || [[word:dashajeshe|dashajeshe]] || [[word:dashaje|dashaje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dashajothoth|dashajothoth]] || [[word:dashajojoj|dashajojoj]] || [[word:dashajoshosh|dashajoshosh]] || [[word:dashaj|dashaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dashajotho|dashajotho]] || [[word:dashajojo|dashajojo]] || [[word:dashajosho|dashajosho]] || [[word:dashajo|dashajo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dashajofoth|dashajofoth]] || [[word:dashajofoj|dashajofoj]] || [[word:dashajofosh|dashajofosh]] || [[word:dashajof|dashajof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dashaj忙th忙|dashaj忙th忙]] || [[word:dashaj忙j忙|dashaj忙j忙]] || [[word:dashaj忙sh忙|dashaj忙sh忙]] || [[word:dashaj忙|dashaj忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dashajathath|dashajathath]] || [[word:dashajajaj|dashajajaj]] || [[word:dashajashash|dashajashash]] || [[word:dashaj|dashaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dashajatha|dashajatha]] || [[word:dashajaja|dashajaja]] || [[word:dashajasha|dashajasha]] || [[word:dashaja|dashaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dashajafath|dashajafath]] || [[word:dashajafaj|dashajafaj]] || [[word:dashajafash|dashajafash]] || [[word:dashajaf|dashajaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:dashajasha|dashajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:godashajasha|godashajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokidashajasha|gokidashajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:dashajn眉sha|dashajn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:godashajnkn眉sha|godashajnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokidashajn眉sha|gokidashajn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dashajsh毛sha|dashajsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godashajnksh毛sha|godashajnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidashajsh毛sha|gokidashajsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dashajrosha|dashajrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:godashajnkrosha|godashajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidashajrosha|gokidashajrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dashajmusha|dashajmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:godashajnkmusha|godashajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidashajmusha|gokidashajmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:dashajsherasha|dashajsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:godashajnksherasha|godashajnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokidashajsherasha|gokidashajsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:dashajngasha|dashajngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:godashajnkngasha|godashajnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokidashajngasha|gokidashajngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dashajyasha|dashajyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:godashajnkyasha|godashajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokidashajyasha|gokidashajyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:dashajyamasha|dashajyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:godashajnkyamasha|godashajnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokidashajyamasha|gokidashajyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:dashajn眉sh毛sha|dashajn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:godashajnkn眉sh毛sha|godashajnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidashajn眉sh毛sha|gokidashajn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dashajn眉rosha|dashajn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godashajnkn眉rosha|godashajnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidashajn眉rosha|gokidashajn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dashajn眉musha|dashajn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godashajnkn眉musha|godashajnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidashajn眉musha|gokidashajn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:dashajsh毛n眉sha|dashajsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:godashajnksh毛n眉sha|godashajnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidashajsh毛n眉sha|gokidashajsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dashajsh毛rosha|dashajsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godashajnksh毛rosha|godashajnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidashajsh毛rosha|gokidashajsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dashajsh毛musha|dashajsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godashajnksh毛musha|godashajnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidashajsh毛musha|gokidashajsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:dashajron眉sha|dashajron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:godashajnkron眉sha|godashajnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidashajron眉sha|gokidashajron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:dashajrosh毛sha|dashajrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:godashajnkrosh毛sha|godashajnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidashajrosh毛sha|gokidashajrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dashajromusha|dashajromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godashajnkromusha|godashajnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidashajromusha|gokidashajromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:dashajmun眉sha|dashajmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:godashajnkmun眉sha|godashajnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidashajmun眉sha|gokidashajmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:dashajmush毛sha|dashajmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:godashajnkmush毛sha|godashajnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidashajmush毛sha|gokidashajmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dashajmurosha|dashajmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godashajnkmurosha|godashajnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidashajmurosha|gokidashajmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:dashaj|dashaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:d忙sh忙j|d忙sh忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hodashaj|hodashaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hod忙sh忙j|hod忙sh忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodashaj|hohodashaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohod忙sh忙j|hohod忙sh忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉dashaj|n眉dashaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉d忙sh忙j|n眉d忙sh忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉dashaj|n眉n眉dashaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉d忙sh忙j|n眉n眉d忙sh忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂dashaj|n茂dashaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂d忙sh忙j|n茂d忙sh忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂dashaj|n茂n茂dashaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂d忙sh忙j|n茂n茂d忙sh忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:ludashaj|ludashaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lud忙sh忙j|lud忙sh忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludashaj|luludashaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulud忙sh忙j|lulud忙sh忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lidashaj|lidashaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lid忙sh忙j|lid忙sh忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidashaj|lilidashaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilid忙sh忙j|lilid忙sh忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kodashaj|kodashaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kod忙sh忙j|kod忙sh忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodashaj|kokodashaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokod忙sh忙j|kokod忙sh忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kedashaj|kedashaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ked忙sh忙j|ked忙sh忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedashaj|kekedashaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keked忙sh忙j|keked忙sh忙j]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|2edd495}}
